:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       eeeeeeee-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeee
:END:
#+title: Nested headlines

A file with a deeply nested headline tree. Each headline has its own
:ID:; anchor resolution must find the right one by CUSTOM_ID, by
title, or by text.

* Outer
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       eeeeee01-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeee
:CUSTOM_ID: outer
:END:

<<outer-anchor>> Outer body — lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.

** Middle
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       eeeeee02-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeee
:CUSTOM_ID: middle
:END:

<<middle-anchor>> Middle body — consectetur adipiscing elit.

*** Inner
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       eeeeee03-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeee
:CUSTOM_ID: inner
:END:

<<inner-anchor>> Inner body — sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt.

**** Deep
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       eeeeee04-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeee
:END:

Deepest headline — ut enim ad minim veniam.

** Side
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       eeeeee05-eeee-eeee-eeee-eeeeeeeeeeee
:END:

Side branch, sibling of Middle.
